content:
# Thermal Maturity

**Summary**: The degree to which organic matter has been altered by heat and pressure.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] assessed the thermal maturity of the source sequence using Tmax and VRo estimates.

- [[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023]] measured TMAX to assess maturity and the impact of preservation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] Determines the window in which hydrocarbons are generated.

- [[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023]] measured TMAX to assess maturity and the impact of preservation.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] Pyrolysis Tmax and calculation of Vitrinite Reflectance.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Samples with TOC > 2% were mostly in the normal oil to condensate-wet gas window (VRo 0.9-1.2%). ([[2020-usman|Usman, 2020, p. 54]])

- TMAX values were also affected by preservation due to changes in S1 and S2 values. ([[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023, p. 13]])
